meaning: adj.数字的,用数表示的adj.数字的,用数字表示的
examples: Numerical increases are used as quantifiable indicators of heightened interest in the new stimulus.
DNS refers to the Domain Name System, which is a directory that connects names to numerical Internet addresses.
April is the deadliest month for tornadoes, and the numerical frequency peaks in May.
Numerical relativity calculations continue to bear fruit for researchers exploiting the Sony Playstation 3.
U.S. officials have said that Russia has an astounding 10 to 1 numerical advantage.
